subject: fix(theme): use correct DaisyUI -content text colors for all bg-* backgrounds
body:
Audited all components and fixed 14 instances where background colors were
paired with text-base-content instead of the matching -content class. DaisyUI
convention: bg-{color} should use text-{color}-content for readable contrast.

Fixes: Toast (success/error/info), TutorialModal (primary), MessageActionSheet
(primary, secondary), ReactionBar (primary), ReportMessageModal (error,
secondary, primary radio dot), create/join screens (accent, secondary),
home error button (accent), chat error button (secondary).

Tags: theme, ui, code-quality, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: uniwind-migration
Semver: patch
